entry.title: Founders of Celsius Network Ordered to Pay $16.5 Million to Resolve FTC Charges
entry.summary: Alexander Mashinsky, the former CEO of cryptocurrency platform Celsius Network Inc.

entry.title: Forensic Science Standards Synergy Summit
entry.summary: An official website of the United States government

entry.title: New Fabric Test Material Could Help Strengthen Domestic Supply Chain for Textiles and Clothing
entry.summary: Researchers estimate that 56% of textiles can be recycled or recovered, but most don’t make it back into the domestic supply chain.

entry.title: Spotlight: How NIST Helps Make Sure the Fish You Catch Are Safe to Eat
entry.summary: To support contaminant measurements in fish, NIST developed a standard reference material.

entry.title: NIST Reference Material Offers Reliable Benchmark for H5N1 Outbreak Detection
entry.summary: To support national disease surveillance, NIST provides tools that verify the accuracy of diagnostic tests for both manufacturers and labs.

entry.title: An RM for Assessing the Working Curve for Resin 3D Printing
entry.summary: NIST supports the nation's advanced manufacturing sector with tools that assure users and manufacturers of 3D‑printed products that their fabrication methods

entry.title: Two New Reference Materials Assist Supplement Manufacturers and Testing Labs with Measurements of Marker Constituents in Eleuthero
entry.summary: Eleuthero is a plant whose stem and roots have been used in traditional medicine across Asia for centuries.

entry.title: Department of Commerce Announces Definitive Agreement with I-Pulse for a $250 Million CHIPS R&D Award to Develop Novel Silicon-Carbide Semiconductors
entry.summary: The Department of Commerce’s CHIPS Research & Development Office today announced the signing of a definitive agreement with I-Pulse for a $250 million award under the CHIPS and Science Act.

entry.title: Veterans: Here are Ways to Help Protect Your Small Business
entry.summary: As a veteran, you’ve worked hard to protect our country. And if you run a small business, you know how important it is to have protections against scammers.

entry.title: Department of Commerce Announces Definitive Agreement with SandboxAQ for a $500 Million CHIPS R&D Award to Accelerate Al-Driven Semiconductor Materials Discovery
entry.summary: The Department of Commerce’s CHIPS Research & Development Office today announced the signing of a definitive agreement with SandboxAQ for a $500 million award under the CHIPS and Science Act.

entry.title: The Department of Commerce’s CHIPS Program Announces a Letter of Intent with Coherent for up to $50 Million to Expand Indium Phosphide Production
entry.summary: The Department of Commerce’s CHIPS Program Office announced the signing of a letter of intent to provide up to $50 million in direct funding to Coherent Corp. (Coherent) under the CHIPS and Science Act.

entry.title: Muck Around and Find Out: NIST's Domestic Sludge SRM
entry.summary: Domestic sludge is the muck collected at wastewater treatment plants.

entry.title: How Loyalty Discounts Between Firms Harm Competition When There Are Network Effects: FTC v. Surescripts
entry.summary: Exclusive contracts are vertical arrangements that restrict one or both parties to the contract from doing business with anyone else.

entry.title: The FTC Is on the Front Lines of Tech Innovation & Regulation
entry.summary: The FTC has been hard at work over the past few years.

entry.title: NIST Risk Management Framework Aims to Improve Trustworthiness of Artificial Intelligence
entry.summary: New guidance seeks to cultivate trust in AI technologies and promote AI innovation while mitigating risk.

entry.title: NIST Seeks Comments on AI Risk Management Framework Guidance, Workshop Date Set
entry.summary: NIST is seeking comments on a second draft of the

entry.title: Symposium Focuses on AI and the Economy and the Path for Responsible and Inclusive AI
entry.summary: The U.S.

entry.title: NIST Seeks Comments on Draft AI Risk Management Framework, Offers Guidance on AI Bias
entry.summary: Seeking to promote the development and use of artificial intelligence (AI) technologies and systems that are trustworthy and responsible, NIST today released

entry.title: Press Releases
entry.summary: The official website of the Federal Trade Commission, protecting America’s consumers for over 100 years.

entry.title: Commission Actions
entry.summary: The official website of the Federal Trade Commission, protecting America’s consumers for over 100 years.

entry.title: Speeches
entry.summary: The official website of the Federal Trade Commission, protecting America’s consumers for over 100 years.

entry.title: Commission publishes guidelines on transparency obligations for providers and deployers of certain AI systems
entry.summary: Today, the European Commission published guidelines to assist providers and deployers of artificial intelligence (AI) systems in meeting the AI Act's transparency obligations, which start to apply on 2 August 2026.

entry.title: Commission fines AliExpress €550 million for breaching the Digital Services Act
entry.summary: Today, the European Commission fined AliExpress €550 million for breaching its obligations under the Digital Services Act (DSA) to diligently assess and mitigate risks relating to the sale of illegal, unsafe or counterfeit products on its e-commerce platform.

entry.title: Commission accepts X’s action plan to comply with Digital Services Act
entry.summary: The European Commission has accepted X’s action plan to comply with transparency obligations and researchers’ access to data, under the Digital Services Act.

entry.title: Digital technologies to power Europe's clean energy transition
entry.summary: The European Commission adopted the Electrification Action Plan and proposed an amendment to Regulation (EU) 2019/943 to future-proof electricity bills in the EU.

entry.title: 2026 Rule of Law Report strengthens Europe's prosperity, security and democratic resilience
entry.summary: The European Commission published its seventh annual Rule of Law Report, assessing the state of the rule of law across all EU Member States, as well as four candidate countries: Albania, Montenegro, North Macedonia and Serbia.

entry.title: Commission provides guidance to Google for AI interoperability on Android and sharing of Google Search data under the Digital Markets Act
entry.summary: The European Commission has issued two sets of binding specification measures to Google under the Digital Markets Act.

entry.title: Commission accepts X's corrective measures to terminate breaches of the DSA
entry.summary: The European Commission has accepted X’s action plan to comply with transparency obligations and researchers’ access to data, under the Digital Services Act.

entry.title: EU and India strengthen strategic partnership with third Trade and Technology Council
entry.summary: The European Union and India held the third meeting of their Trade and Technology Council (TTC) in Brussels, reaffirming the TTC as a central platform for cooperation on trade, technology and security.

entry.title: Commission approves €659 million German State aid for four new semiconductor facilities
entry.summary: The European Commission has approved €659 million in German State aid to support the establishment of four first-of-a-kind facilities in the semiconductor value chain.

entry.title: Team Europe wins 1st ever International Cybersecurity Challenge for women | ENISA
entry.summary: Back to News

entry.title: EU agrees to simplify AI rules to boost innovation and ban ‘nudification' apps to protect citizens
entry.summary: The European Commission welcomes the political agreement reached between the European Parliament and the Council of the EU on simpler, innovation-friendly rules for artificial intelligence (AI).

entry.title: Supporting the implementation of the AI Act with clear guidelines
entry.summary: The AI Office is preparing guidelines to ensure a smooth implementation of the AI Act.

entry.title: Commission presents EU Action Plan on Cybersecurity and Artificial Intelligence
entry.summary: The European Commission has presented an Action Plan for a structured response to address the risks and harness the opportunities of advanced artificial intelligence (AI) models for cybersecurity.

entry.title: How do AI models persuade? Exploring the levers of AI-enabled persuasion through large-scale experiments | AISI Work
entry.summary: A deep dive into AISI’s study of the persuasive capabilities of conversational AI, published today in Science.

entry.title: Deepening our partnership with Google DeepMind | AISI Work
entry.summary: Expanding our collaboration with a new research MOU

entry.title: “促进全球人工智能朝着向上向善、造福人类的方向发展”——习近平主席出席二〇二六世界人工 智能大会暨人工智能全球治理高级别会议系列活动纪实
entry.summary: 7月17日的上海，大国外交的华章、科技创新的盛景，交相辉映。

entry.summary: 新华社上海7月17日电

entry.title: 2026年全国工业和信息化主管部门负责同志座谈会在京召开
entry.summary: 2026年全国工业和信息化主管部门负责同志座谈会在京召开

entry.title: 工业和信息化部召开树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育开门教育座谈会
entry.summary: 2026年7月15日，工业和信息化部党组书记、部长李乐成主持召开树立和践行正确政绩观学习教育开门教育座谈会，通报部学习教育开展情况，听取基层一线行业企业和干部群众意见建议。部总工程师钟志红、王卫明出席会议。

entry.title: 李乐成会见沙特通信和信息技术大臣阿卜杜拉·苏瓦哈
entry.summary: 2026年7月14日，工业和信息化部部长李乐成在京会见沙特通信和信息技术大臣阿卜杜拉·苏瓦哈，双方就深化中沙信息通信领域合作进行深入交流。

entry.title: 工业和信息化部举行“亚太经合组织（APEC）2026年数字和人工智能部长会议及数字周相关活动新闻通气会”
entry.summary: 2026年7月10日，工业和信息化部举行“亚太经合组织（APEC）2026年数字和人工智能部长会议及数字周相关活动新闻通气会”。工业和信息化部副部长熊继军，APEC中国高官、外交部国际经济司参赞程烈，工业和信息化部国际合作司副司长张晓雷，国家数据局国际数据治理合作司司长宋宪荣，四川省人民政府副秘书长、办公厅主任杨昕，成都市人民政府副市长许兴国出席新闻通气会，介绍有关情况并回答记者提问。本次新闻通气会由工业和信息化部新闻发言人、办公厅副主任龚宪主持。

entry.title: 习近平对重庆彭水县山体崩塌作出重要指示
entry.summary: 习近平对重庆彭水县山体崩塌作出重要指示强调 科学组织搜救 加强监测预警和巡查排险 切实保障人民群众生命财产安全 李强作出批示

entry.title: 李强主持召开国务院常务会议 听取对服务业扩能提质和“六张网”规划建设督查情况汇报等
entry.summary: 李强主持召开国务院常务会议 听取对服务业扩能提质和“六张网”规划建设督查情况汇报 审议通过《知识产权保护和运用“十五五”规划》 研究优化社会保障体系有关工作 听取2025年度中央预算执行和其他财政收支审计查出问题整改工作建议汇报
